classes.name: Rainfed cropland
classes.description: Cropland under rainfed agricultural management.

classes.name: Herbaceous cover cropland
classes.description: Rainfed cropland dominated by herbaceous cover.

classes.name: Tree or shrub cover cropland (orchard)
classes.description: Orchards and croplands dominated by tree or shrub cover.

classes.name: Irrigated cropland
classes.description: Cropland supported primarily by irrigation.

classes.name: Open evergreen broadleaved forest
classes.description: Evergreen broadleaved forest with relatively open canopy.

classes.name: Closed evergreen broadleaved forest
classes.description: Evergreen broadleaved forest with closed canopy.

classes.name: Open deciduous broadleaved forest
classes.description: Deciduous broadleaved forest with fractional cover between 0.15 and 0.4.

classes.name: Closed deciduous broadleaved forest
classes.description: Deciduous broadleaved forest with fractional cover above 0.4.

classes.name: Open evergreen needle-leaved forest
classes.description: Evergreen needle-leaved forest with fractional cover between 0.15 and 0.4.

classes.name: Closed evergreen needle-leaved forest
classes.description: Evergreen needle-leaved forest with fractional cover above 0.4.

classes.name: Open deciduous needle-leaved forest
classes.description: Deciduous needle-leaved forest with fractional cover between 0.15 and 0.4.

classes.name: Closed deciduous needle-leaved forest
classes.description: Deciduous needle-leaved forest with fractional cover above 0.4.

classes.name: Open mixed leaf forest
classes.description: Mixed broadleaved and needle-leaved forest with open canopy.

classes.name: Closed mixed leaf forest
classes.description: Mixed broadleaved and needle-leaved forest with closed canopy.

classes.name: Shrubland
classes.description: Shrub-dominated vegetation.

classes.name: Evergreen shrubland
classes.description: Shrubland dominated by evergreen species.

classes.name: Deciduous shrubland
classes.description: Shrubland dominated by deciduous species.

classes.name: Grassland
classes.description: Areas dominated by grasses and herbaceous plants.

classes.name: Lichens and mosses
classes.description: Areas dominated by lichen and moss cover.

classes.name: Sparse vegetation
classes.description: Vegetation with fractional cover less than 0.15.

classes.name: Sparse shrubland
classes.description: Shrubland with fractional cover less than 0.15.

classes.name: Sparse herbaceous
classes.description: Herbaceous vegetation with fractional cover less than 0.15.

classes.name: Wetlands
classes.description: Marshes, swamps, peatlands, or other wetlands.

classes.name: Impervious surfaces
classes.description: Built-up or impervious urban surfaces.

classes.name: Bare areas
classes.description: General bare ground with minimal vegetation.

classes.name: Consolidated bare areas
classes.description: Bare areas with consolidated surfaces such as rock or pavement.

classes.name: Unconsolidated bare areas
classes.description: Bare areas composed of unconsolidated materials like sand.

classes.name: Water body
classes.description: Lakes, reservoirs, rivers, or other surface water.

classes.name: Permanent ice and snow
classes.description: Glaciers or perennial snow and ice.

classes.name: Filled value
classes.description: Landcover data not present.
